label: 第233話
source_locator: 単行本26巻 目次 p.107
summary_short: 魔虚羅が無限へ適応し、五条を斬れるようになる。宿儺は魔虚羅と合成式神・嵌合獣顎吐を加え、三対一で五条を追い詰める。
summary_full: 魔虚羅が無限へ適応し、五条を斬れるようになる。宿儺は魔虚羅と合成式神・嵌合獣顎吐を加え、三対一で五条を追い詰める。魔虚羅は無限へ適応し、五条を直接斬れるようになる。宿儺は鵺・大蛇・円鹿などの能力を継承した顎吐を召喚し、自身も影から攻撃へ加わって魔虚羅との三方向から五条を追い詰める。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: With 魔虚羅 adapting to the 無限 and his output falling fast, 五条悟 's back is against the wall. Although thoughts of defeat enter his mind, 五条 is not overcome with fear. Instead, he can only feel an overwhelming sense of satisfaction.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 魔虚羅's 退魔の剣 infiltrates the 無限 and slashes 五条 across the shoulder. 悠仁 , 憂太 , and 秤 look on in concern for their sensei. 悠仁 tries to restore resolve by stating that 五条 isn't finished yet. He argues that without the 無限, 五条 and 宿儺 are on even terms and he can still quickly heal any injury. 硝子 tells 悠仁 that 五条's 呪力 output is dropping so his 反転術式 is taking longer to heal wounds. 宿儺 using more 式神 to support 魔虚羅. Even up against the King of Curses, none of 五条's allies would ever believe he could be bested. However, now, for the first time, the thought of the invincible 五条悟 losing floods their mind. The same thought strikes 五条 himself as he wonders when was the last time a similar sensation came over him. A memory of 伏黒甚爾 flashes in his mind, reminding him of the obvious answer. Rather than fear or despair, the feeling that overcomes 五条 is deep satisfaction. Solitude accompanies absolute strength but in this moment 宿儺 has managed to give 五条 fulfillment. 五条 begins his counterattack, unleashing a flurry of punches to 魔虚羅's head before finishing his combo with a double palm thrust. The attack sends 魔虚羅 crashing backward. As the 式神 is recovering, 五条 recites the incantation of 術式 術式反転「赫」 to recover his fallen output. Hiding in 五条's shadow, 宿儺 unleashes 脱兎 to impede his opponent's view. Amused, 五条 says he can tell 宿儺 is still reeling from 黒閃 and blasts the shadow with Red. 宿儺 imitates 穿血 to attack when 魔虚羅 creates openings. 宿儺 retreats and 魔虚羅 takes up a position to cover him. 五条 believes the 式神 will be on the offensive while 宿儺 ensures its not destroyed. 宿儺 throws a fire extinguisher that explodes on impact with 五条's 無限. 魔虚羅 jumps above the smokescreen while 宿儺 imitates the stance for 穿血 , surprising 脹相. 宿儺 fires an extremely fast stream of water at 五条 while he's blocking an assault from 魔虚羅. 五条 is taken by surprise and forced to use one of his arms to block the projectile, injuring it. 魔虚羅 continues its offensive and 五条 jumps out of the way, realizing that 宿儺 will also attack whenever 魔虚羅 has negated the 無限, making this fight a two-against-one. "It's three against one." Even 五条 is impressed with 宿儺's skill, wondering how he managed to deploy 満象 's water without manifesting the 式神. He knows 宿儺 can't use his 御廚子 and 恵's 十種影法術 術式 simultaneously without a domain . He can, however, utilize more of the 式神 now that 魔虚羅 has adapted to the 無限. 五条 believes it'll take longer for 魔虚羅 to adapt to Red and prefers this situation to the 式神 adapting to his techniques one after the other. 五条 unable to destroy 魔虚羅 with a single strike from Red. 宿儺 dismisses the idea that this fight is two-on-one and summons 鵺 渾: 嵌合獣 顎吐 顎吐 , making it three-on-one instead. 五条 taunts 宿儺 for looking like a little lost alien child between the two massive 式神. 魔虚羅 and 顎吐 rush 五条 as their master smirks at the remark. 五条 retreats and 宿儺 emerges from his shadow to fire another imitation of 穿血 from behind. 五条 narrowly avoids the beam and crushes the ground, forcing 宿儺 to jump out of the way. The two 式神 encircle 五条 but he maneuvers behind 魔虚羅 before blasting its head with Red. It doesn't do nearly as much damage as it normally would, due only in part to 五条's low output. This proves to him that 魔虚羅 is adapting incrementally, meaning there is only one way to destroy 魔虚羅 with a single attack. It takes time to charge and 宿儺's guard is up, proven by his prioritizing of relentless offensive over adapting to Red. 五条 grins with a hidden plan behind his smile to finish this battle with 虚式「茈」 .

candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: 東京 新宿 新宿

key_events_verified_phase11: 魔虚羅が無限へ適応し、五条を斬れるようになる。
宿儺は魔虚羅と合成式神・嵌合獣顎吐を加え、三対一で五条を追い詰める。
魔虚羅は無限へ適応し、五条を直接斬れるようになる。
宿儺は鵺・大蛇・円鹿などの能力を継承した顎吐を召喚し、自身も影から攻撃へ加わって魔虚羅との三方向から五条を追い詰める。
verification_notes_phase11: 集英社公式24～30巻目次・巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別資料、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した最終区間。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
